name: Stitch
description: Monitor Stitch ETL data pipelines for data source connectivity and compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Stitch at https://app.stitchdata.com
2. Go to Account Settings → API Keys
3. Generate an access token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Stitch Account Settings → API Keys

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Stitch destinations are configured to receive ETL data
